description: A chronological marker, sequence of events, or timeline relevant to a news story

name.description: A label for the timeline or sequence of events

entries.description: Ordered list of events in the timeline, each with a date and description

date.description: The date or timestamp of the entry (ISO 8601 format preferred)

description.description: What happened at this point in the timeline

category.description: The category of events this timeline covers

source.description: The source(s) from which the timeline information was compiled
